title: Medieval Additions
description: This mod adds many fun Medieval Additions to minecraft. They would include: Armor, Weapons, mobs and more!
body:
**What is this mod?**
Medieval Additions is mod all about adding some Medieval features to minecraft! 
Maybe you can go out exploring and find a cottage! maybe even the legendary Diamond Sword!
Do you want to combine the features of the sword and axe? BATTLEAXE! Want to cosplay as a knight? Want to..... Crush rocks? well.... I HAVE THE MOD FOR YOU! YOU CANCRUSH YOUR ROCKS BUT....... YOU CAN SHOOT THEM TOO!! 
**What are some features?**
- Sword in stone structure
- Cottage Structure
- Netherite Battleaxe
- Steel ore (Ingots, Knights armor crafted with)
- Knights armor set
- Knights Shield (WIP TEXTURE)
- Knight Entity
- Kings Claymore
- Slingshot
- Boss Block
- Boss Key
